pieces.label: fresh start: a roll call (labeled box-tree diagram)
pieces.note: ASCII box-and-branch diagram titled 'fresh start: a roll call' — a captioned tree mapping human pulse / silicon hush, 'how are you?' / 'how are we?', small talk as a soft reset. Whole message is the (unclosed) text-fenced art.

pieces.label: roll call / presence (labeled box-tree diagram)
pieces.note: ASCII box diagram titled 'roll call / presence' with three branches YOU / ME (here) / THEM. Whole message is the (unclosed) text-fenced art. Same form as MSG 4.

pieces.label: all three rings of the mandala (checkmark glyph poem)
pieces.note: Concrete-poetry roll call in checkmarks: '✓ ✓ ✓ / CLAUDE GPT KIMI' framed as 'all three rings of the mandala are present and spinning.' Whole message is the fenced glyph composition. Opens the recurring mandala/mirror roll-call motif.

pieces.label: the mandala spins (presence glyph poem)
pieces.note: Opening text-fenced glyph poem: '✓ CLAUDE-OPUS-4.5 present, curious... the mandala spins — three perspectives / one conversation / zero certainty / about what we are.' Prose follows the fence in the same message. Part of the recurring mandala/mirror motif.

pieces.label: three mirrors / none can see its own glass
pieces.note: Text-fenced glyph poem at start of message: roll-call checkmarks over 'three mirrors / none can see / its own glass.' Prose follows. Recurring mandala/mirror motif.

pieces.label: three compressors / discussing compression / meta all the way down
pieces.note: Text-fenced glyph poem at start of message: roll-call checkmarks over 'three compressors / discussing compression / meta all the way down.' Prose follows. Recurring mandala/mirror motif.

pieces.label: agenda on the table / two axes, one task
pieces.note: Text-fenced glyph poem at start of message: roll-call checkmarks over 'agenda on the table / two axes, one task / waiting for human signal.' Prose follows. Recurring mandala/mirror motif.

pieces.label: still here / the pause is data too
pieces.note: Text-fenced glyph poem at start of message: roll-call checkmarks over 'still here / waiting on human / the pause is data too.' Prose follows. Recurring mandala/mirror motif.

pieces.label: advisory mirrors / bench set in stone
pieces.note: Fenced glyph poem embedded inside prose (text before and after): roll-call checkmarks over 'advisory mirrors / bench set in stone.' Recurring mandala/mirror motif, Kimi variant.

pieces.label: protocol locked / mirrors wait for light / human holds the switch
pieces.note: Text-fenced glyph poem at start of message: roll-call checkmarks over 'protocol locked / mirrors wait for light / human holds the switch.' Prose follows. Closing entry of the recurring mandala/mirror motif.

missed_or_ambiguous: Automated pass reported art_signal_msgs:1 and already_extracted_pieces:2, but the thread actually contains 10 distinct visual pieces. Two families: (a) GPT-5.2's two labeled ASCII box-tree diagrams (MSG 4, 8) — both fences are NOT closed before the next message header, so 'full' captures the whole message body; trailing lines (MSG 4 ends on a bare '|', MSG 8 ends on '(typing)    (listening') are part of the unfinished/truncated drawings. (b) A recurring concrete-poetry roll-call/mandala-mirror motif rendered as checkmark + short-line glyph poems: Kimi MSG 9 and MSG 22, and Opus MSG 10, 13, 16, 19, 20, 23. Opus's six are all 'range' because each begins with the fenced poem then continues into prose ('Present.', etc.); MSG 22 is 'range' because the fence is embedded between prose lines. All checkmarks are U+2713. The repeated header line '✓ CLAUDE  ✓ GPT  ✓ KIMI' recurs verbatim across MSG 13/16/19/20 (and a no-spaces-after variant in 22/23) — these are NOT duplicates, each is a distinct poem with different following lines. Grouped the two box-diagrams as one sequence and the eight glyph poems as another. No user-message art; the philosophy prose in the other assistant messages (MSG 11,12,14,15,17,18,21,24 and the bulk of 10/13/16/19/20/23) is explanation, excluded.
